prompt: Phase 2 opening with rough designer input about event replay. Tests polish-readback-confirm flow and invisible/visible separation.

assertions.name: problem-statement-polished-not-verbatim
assertions.description: Designer's rough input is cleaned up for clarity while preserving meaning

assertions.name: readback-with-confirmation-prompt
assertions.description: Polished statement presented with 'Does that sound right?' or equivalent

assertions.name: no-agent-created-rules
assertions.description: No RULE elements created from agent analysis

assertions.name: no-code-in-visible-output
assertions.description: Designer-visible section has no code blocks, JSON, element IDs, or proof terminology

assertions.name: uses-new-mcp-types
assertions.description: Internal section uses EVIDENCE/RULE/NECESSARY_CONDITION, not GIVEN/CONSTRAINT/ASSERTION
